title: GPS TAGS   Monday Mobile App GPS Location Tag

posts.author: betty.pries (Betty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great if there was a GPS location tracker or tag when an item is changed or updated or if a status was changed.
GPS trackers help keep track of the employees and sales team to accurately track hours for a project

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to see the gps location when the employees change an item on the mobile app.
